name: THOR INDUSTRIES INC
summary: THOR Industries, Inc., founded in 1980, is the largest manufacturer of recreational vehicles (RVs) in the world. The company manufactures conventional travel trailers, fifth wheels, Class A, Class B, and Class C motorhomes in the U.S. and Europe through subsidiaries including Airstream, Jayco, Keystone, Thor Motor Coach, Tiffin Group, and Erwin Hymer Group. Products are sold primarily to independent, non-franchise dealers in the U.S., Canada, and Europe, along with related parts, accessories, and RV component products.
